mapper.select:
SELECT sid, log_date AS logDate, campaign_id AS campaignId, campaign_name AS campaignName,
MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 1 THEN roi END) AS roi1d, MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 1 THEN cvr END) AS cvr1d, MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 1 THEN ecpc END) AS ecpc1d, MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 1 THEN cart_cost END) AS cartCost1d,
MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 3 THEN roi END) AS roi3d, MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 3 THEN cvr END) AS cvr3d, MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 3 THEN ecpc END) AS ecpc3d, MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 3 THEN cart_cost END) AS cartCost3d,
MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 7 THEN roi END) AS roi7d, MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 7 THEN cvr END) AS cvr7d, MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 7 THEN ecpc END) AS ecpc7d, MAX(CASE WHEN effect = 7 THEN cart_cost END) AS cartCost7d FROM onebp_report_day_campaign WHERE sid = #{sid} AND log_date = #{logDate} AND effect IN (1, 3, 7) GROUP BY sid, log_date, campaign_id, campaign_name ORDER BY campaign_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
